searchStringsArray.title: Search Terms
searchStringsArray.description: List of search terms to query on Google Maps (e.g. plumbers in Austin, coffee shops NYC). Each runs independently and results are deduplicated.
prefill: coffee shops in San Francisco, CA

locationQuery.title: Location
locationQuery.description: Free-text location (city, state, country). Geocoded via OpenStreetMap.

maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch.title: Max Places Per Search
maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch.description: Maximum number of places to extract per search term.

extractEmails.title: Extract Emails
extractEmails.description: Visit each business website and attempt to extract email addresses. Increases run time.

verifyEmails.title: Email Verification
verifyEmails.description: Verify extracted emails via DNS MX lookup. 'Flag' adds deliverability info. 'Filter' only keeps emails that can receive mail (removes disposable/invalid).

incrementalMode.title: Incremental Mode
enumTitles: Flag — mark new vs previously seen
New Only — only scrape new places
incrementalMode.description: Track previously scraped places using Apify KV store. 'Flag' adds an _isNew field. 'New Only' returns only places not seen in previous runs.

crmFormat.title: CRM Export Format
crmFormat.description: Add pre-formatted CRM import rows to each result for one-click CSV import.
